sequenceDiagram
    A->>B: request
    alt is valid
        B-->>A: success
    else is invalid
        B-->>A: error
    end
---
+---+     +---+
| A |     | B |
+-+-+     +-+-+
  |         |
  | request |
  +-------->|
+-[alt is valid]-+
| |         |    |
| | success |    |
| |<........+    |
+.[is invalid]...+
| |         |    |
| | error   |    |
| |<........+    |
| |         |    |
+----------------+
  |         |
